title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
